member.name: T:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService
member.summary: Handles all Thermal related activities.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.VerifyAndGetPinsObject(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Receives a list of pins for verifying they exists and return an object for further use.
member.param: List of pins to be used.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauGetMeasurement(Prime.ThermalService.IPinsModelObject,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets TDAU measurements on a list of pins optionally storing them based on Tag.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Dictionary of pins with measured value.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauStoreMeasurement(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stores Tdau measurement of pin.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauStoreMeasurement(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double},System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stores Tdau measurement of pin.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauGetStoredMeasurementByTag(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets stored TDAU measurements matching storage tag.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Stored measurement per pin by tag.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauGetStoredMeasurementsByTag(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets stored TDAU measurements matching storage tag.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Stored measurements per pin by tag.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauGetParametricValues(System.String)
member.summary: Get parametric values for input pins.
member.param: Pins to get parametric information from.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauProfileStart(Prime.ThermalService.IPinsModelObject,System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Starts profiling on input pins at specified sample rate.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauProfileStop(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Stops current profiling action.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.TdauProfileGetValues(Prime.ThermalService.IPinsModelObject,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets values stored during profiling.
member.param: Optional tag to get values from.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: List of values recorded by pin.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.UeiStreamingStart(System.Boolean,Prime.ThermalService.IPinsModelObject,Prime.ThermalService.DtsModes)
member.summary: Starts TCC streaming.
member.param: Defines the Dts mode for the UEI streaming.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.UeiStreamingStart(System.Boolean,Prime.ThermalService.IPinsModelObject,Prime.ThermalService.DtsModes,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Starts TCC streaming. This method was not implemented yet for TOS4.
member.param: Defines the Dts mode for the UEI streaming.
Defines the list of scs groups used in tcc stream mode. Supported only in TOS321.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.UeiStreamingStop(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Stops TCC streaming.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.ApplyControlSet(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies the given ControlSet to the pin name set on SetPinNameForControlSet.
member.param: uei pin name in which the ControlSet will be applied.
Index of the ControlSet to apply.
amount of milliseconds to wait before actually applying the control set.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.GetCurrentIndexControlSetAttribute(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the current controlSet index using a given UEI Slave Pin Name.
member.returns: Returns the name of the control set name of the index in the hardware based on the data loaded using the AddControlSetMapping.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.GetPcsTokens(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Summarizes all stored measurements to prepare PCS data for printing.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Struct of PCS tokens ready for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.GetProfilePcsTokens(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Summarizes all profile measurements to prepare PCS data for printing.
member.param: Name of the collection in which the measurements were taken.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Struct of PCS tokens ready for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.ClearStoredData(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Clear any stored data for Thermal measurements.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.IsUeiClientDtc(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks if the UeiClientPort0 resource pin is of type DTC.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: True if UEI client type is DTC.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.HasUei
member.summary: If Prime detects or not the UEI.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.GetThermalHeadTemperatureFromDtc(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the temperature of the DTC thermal head.

member.name: M:Prime.ThermalService.IThermalService.ApplySerialCaptureGroupMap(System.String)
member.summary: Applies the supplied SerialCaptureGroupMap contents in the SerialCapture Group Map .scgm.
member.param: Name of the serial capture group to apply.

member.summary: Gets the serial capture group map.

member.summary: Gets serial capture group map names.
member.returns: List of names of the serial capture groups.

member.summary: Enable/disable serial capture group filter alarm.
member.param: True for enable or false for disable.

member.summary: Gets Rc hardware sync timer.

member.summary: Get a list with the names of all the pins of TDAU resource type.

member.returns: list of all pin names of TDAU resource type.

member.summary: Get data packets coming from thermal controller.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: Object with Rx and Tx packets.

member.summary: Initializes handle to capture UEI packets.

member.summary: Get all serial capture pin names.

member.returns: List of serial captured pin names.
